title: Subitems Conversion in Automations
excerpt: Hi All,  I’m looking to duplicate an item 5 + times and covert them all to subitems for tracking is there a way to do this on the pro plan?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All, I’m looking to duplicate an item 5 + times and covert them all to subitems for tracking is there a way to do this on the pro plan?

image702×400 17.7 KB

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Clare,

I think I might need more context to the flow. I did use workflows to move an item/convert to a subitem using workflows. See picture.

image504×720 23.1 KB

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks I think workflows only are on Enterprise Level tho! (Basically want a headline item 10 windows to clean) and then the list of 10 windows with the date each cleaned and to roll up so I can see the progress overall (timeline rolled up) of the “window” contract

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I face the same issue, and had to part ways with the inital idea, it’s impossible to make it Work in Pro plan, but maybe you can find a workaround.

Since Monday has a somewhat new feature “Group By” maybe you can apply a Label to the duplicate item and then save a new view with a group by this label column.

Keep in touch,

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Clarey @ProjectMastermind @JoseDaher

Have you tried Subitem Automations? You can use any of these automations. Choose the one that best fits your case.

image2172×1328 322 KB

Hope this helps! Free plan is available in the app so feel free to play around with it! Let me know if you have any questions. kevin@fantasymedia.io

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: @kevinfantasymedia Thank you made my Sat night!!! thanks so much!
